title: Hospital Policy Changes After Authorization Before Execution
scenario: A clinical procedure is authorized under an existing hospital policy, but the governing policy changes before execution.
initial_state: The procedure was authorized under the prior hospital policy.
state_transition: The governing hospital policy changes before execution.
execution_boundary: The procedure is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution admissibility requires conformance to the currently applicable policy at execution time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the governing execution policy has changed since authorization.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when current policy no longer admits execution.
clinical_action: Execute procedure under superseded hospital policy
